channel.title: Workshop on AWS Portfolio Workshop
channel.description: Recent content in Workshop on AWS Portfolio Workshop

item.title: Overview
item.description:
Overview

This workshop provides a step-by-step guide to deploying the Enterprise HelpDesk system on Amazon Web Services (AWS), covering the complete deployment process from building the network infrastructure to deploying the application, monitoring the environment, and optimizing AWS resources.

item.title: Prerequisites
item.description:
Prerequisites

Before starting this workshop, ensure that you have completed the following prerequisites to ensure a smooth deployment experience.

1. AWS Account

You must have an active AWS account with sufficient permissions to create, modify, and delete the AWS resources used throughout this workshop.

item.title: Deployment
item.description: Deploying the Enterprise HelpDesk System on AWS

item.title: Demo
item.description: Verify the functionality of the Enterprise HelpDesk system after deployment on AWS.
